buildCommand: pnpm install && pnpm --filter @benzo/core build && pnpm --filter @benzo/console build

rewrites.//: Proxy the console BFF. Set BENZO_API_ORIGIN in Vercel env to the deployed console-api origin (e.g. https://benzo-console-api.fly.dev). The BFF holds the org's funded operator key + does on-chain submit; the browser sends proofs + public inputs, never the witness.
SPA client-side routing fallback — every non-asset path serves index.html so /payroll, /pay, /treasury, /approvals, /invites, /grants all resolve.
